transcript:
Agent: Thanks for contacting CloudSync support. This is Alex. What can I help you with?
Customer: Hi Alex. I was charged twice this month for my subscription. I see two charges of $29.99 on my bank statement.
Agent: That's definitely something we need to fix immediately. I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Let me look up your account. Can I get your email address?
Customer: It's user@example.com.
Agent: Thank you. I can see your account. You're on the Professional plan. I'm checking your billing history now. I can confirm there was a duplicate charge on February 20th — both at $29.99. One was a system error during a payment retry cycle.
Customer: So I was overcharged?
Agent: Yes, and I sincerely apologize. I'm processing a full refund for the duplicate charge right now. You'll see $29.99 back on your account within 3-5 business days.
Customer: Okay. Will this happen again?
Agent: I've also flagged your account to prevent this from recurring and escalated it to our billing engineering team. This was a bug in our retry logic that affected a small number of accounts.
Customer: I appreciate that. Also, I've been thinking about upgrading to the Business plan. What are the differences?
Agent: The Business plan is $79.99 per month and adds unlimited storage, team collaboration features, priority support, and advanced analytics. The Professional plan you're on has 1 TB storage and no team features.
Customer: If I upgrade mid-month, will I be charged prorated?
Agent: Yes, exactly. You'd only be charged for the remaining days in the billing cycle, then the full $79.99 starting next month. Want me to make the switch now?
Customer: Let me think about it. I'll call back if I decide to upgrade.
Agent: Of course, no pressure. Your refund is confirmed. Anything else I can help with?
Customer: No, that's all. Thanks for the quick resolution.
Agent: Happy to help. Have a great day!
